title: Minetale - Hytale in Minecraft
description: A community-driven mod that is adding Hytale to Minecraft
body:
![Minetale logo](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/ae0fe249228b580ddbd5a46216ff3d932d50878eb59f30b3c5409078f0c87ed5/68747470733a2f2f692e6962622e636f2f6252486a575a7a632f6d696e6574616c652d6c6f676f2e706e67)

## Adding Hytale to Minecraft



Minetale is a work-in-progress open-source mod that tries to port Hytale to Minecraft, while keeping the Minecraft asthetics.



**Currently, the mod adds: (only in Creative)**

- Amber Woodset
- Marble Stoneset
